name: donghyuns-agent-tools
description: Donghyun's personal plugin marketplace for coding agents

plugins.name: spec-mirror
plugins.description: Six-skill safety net: generate, drift-check, lint, test-stub, coverage-audit, and scope-walk E2E specs against the current implementation

plugins.name: qa-operator
plugins.description: Delegated browser QA operator: plan, run, monitor, triage, and optionally repair acceptance checks from requirements with evidence dashboards

plugins.name: feature-intake
plugins.description: Screenshot-backed product intake for external PoCs, demos, prototypes, and VoC experiments before product integration, now with page-walk and control-reaction coverage

plugins.name: ui-operator
plugins.description: Evidence-backed UI iteration operator for baseline/current web, mobile web, native mobile, and local session-derived state comparisons during product UI changes
